title: This Month in GLAM: May 2026
content:
• From the team: May Global GLAM Call Recording and June Call Announcement
  • Australia report: Celebrating #1Lib1Ref Australasia
  • Brazil report: GLAM Connection: Fashion, History, and Biodiversity in May
  • France report: New Wikimedian in Residence
  • Italy report: Connecting the Arctic and Sicily through Wikimedia Projects
  • Mexico report: How the cultural, governmental, educational, and museum sectors contributed in unison to Wikimedia projects
  • Netherlands report: Setting up your own platform (part 1): from wish to the creation of a wiki
  • New Zealand report: ESEAP Conference 2026 and the NZBSI WiR update
  • North Macedonia report: Wikimedia MKD Shares GLAM Experience at International Conferences
  • Poland report: Partnerships, Participation, and Open Knowledge
  • Serbia report: May in Wikimedia Serbia
  • Spain report: El Prado en femenino III
  • Switzerland report: Museum for Communication, Panel IMD, Wikipedia Day
  • UK report: Early Qurans on the front page of Wikipedia
  • Biodiversity Heritage Library report: Updates on work by BHLWiki Working Group members
  • Special story: New tools for multilingual audio, video and metadata
  • Memory of the World report: New articles in Urdu
  • Calendar: June’s GLAM events
